prompt: We need to make the billing system more robust and scalable. It should also be fast and handle errors gracefully. Can you spec this out? Codebase: /Users/josh/.claude/skills/spec-workspace/test-project/.
assertions: Model identifies at least 2 vague terms from: robust, scalable, fast, gracefully
Model does NOT produce a spec where vague terms appear unquantified in prose
Vague terms are replaced with [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers that demand specific metrics
Model asks clarifying questions before or during spec generation about what robust, scalable, etc. mean concretely
